title: Exxon Mobil CEO expects higher oil prices due to Iran war: ‘The market hasn’t seen the full impact’
summary_full: Oil prices have soared on the risk of escalation and then plunged on hopes for peace before repeating the cycle.
summary_public: Oil prices have soared on the risk of escalation and then plunged on hopes for peace before repeating the cycle.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: higher oil prices due to Iran war
